targets.query:
from(bucket: "network-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "interface_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rx_bytes")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["node"])

from(bucket: "network-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "interface_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tx_bytes")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["node"])

from(bucket: "network-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "interface_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rx_errors")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: sum)
  |> group(columns: ["node"])

from(bucket: "network-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "remediation_actions")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: count)

from(bucket: "network-metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "interface_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rx_bytes")
  |> last()
  |> count()

options.content:

**Autor:** Carlos David Rodriguez Lopez — ESPOCH
